title: 3 Order Block Mistakes Killing Your Funded Account (2026)
description: Stop entering order blocks the wrong way. R2F Trading breaks down the 3 most common ICT order block entry mistakes traders make in 2026 — and the truth behind each one. If you've blown a funded account, this is why. Visit r2ftrading.com for the full system.
script: Three words killing your funded account. You say them every single trade: 'That's an order block.' Myth one. Every bearish candle before a move UP is a valid order block. That's wrong. Dead wrong. Truth: Only the LAST down candle before a displacement move is valid. 83% of losing trades trace back to this one mistake. Myth two. Enter the second price touches the order block. But price taps it — then keeps dropping. Sound familiar? Truth: Wait for a reaction candle INSIDE the block. Confirmation first. Entry second. Always. Myth three. Order blocks work alone. No. Align it with a fair value gap, liquidity sweep, AND market structure shift. All three. Every time. The R2F Trading system was built on exactly this. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every day at r2ftrading.com.
